message:
perf(web): bundle size optimizations

- Fix global-error build failure by using <a> instead of <Link>
  (global error handler can't rely on Next.js router being available)
- Make jszip a dynamic import in BasketSidebar
  (only loads when user downloads multiple files)
- Remove unused MessageContent/MessageDetail exports from barrel
  (react-syntax-highlighter components were exported but never used)

Bundle: 658KB gzipped total (target: 300KB requires product decisions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
